parameters.formDescription: Submit new-hire details to provision their Microsoft 365 account.

assignments.name: mailNickname
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const f = $json['First Name'].trim(); const l = $json['Last Name'].trim(); return (f.charAt(0) + l).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, ''); })() }}

assignments.name: userPrincipalName
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const f = $json['First Name'].trim(); const l = $json['Last Name'].trim(); const nick = (f.charAt(0) + l).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, ''); return nick + '@michaelgraves.com'; })() }}

parameters.command: =pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Connect-ExchangeOnline -CertificateThumbprint '9A5360CF006242900CE0C1636BC63392835DD5D0' -AppId '45c9b518-c0b0-4933-bfff-29ff6c11831a' -Organization 'michaelgravesarchitecture.onmicrosoft.com' -ShowBanner:$false; try { (Get-Mailbox -Identity '{{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}').RecipientTypeDetails } finally { Disconnect-ExchangeOnline -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } "

parameters.subject: Action Required: Possible Duplicate Account - New Hire Provisioning
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

The new hire provisioning workflow found that {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }} ({{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}) already has an existing M365 account, and that account is not a shared mailbox.

This indicates a likely duplicate account. Please review before any further action is taken.

  • User Principal Name: {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}
  • Display Name: {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }}
  • Detected Mailbox Type: {{ $('Check Mailbox Type').item.json.stdout.trim() }}
  • Current License(s): {{ $json.existingLicenses.length ? $json.existingLicenses.join(', ') : 'None assigned' }}

parameters.subject: Action Required: No License Available - New Hire (Reenabled Account)
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

An existing M365 mailbox is being converted/reenabled for {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }} ({{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}), but the following requested license(s) currently have no available seats:

    {{ $json.unavailableLicenses.map(l => '
  • ' + l.licenseName + '
    • ').join('') }}

The account will still be reenabled; any other requested license(s) with available seats will be assigned normally. Please purchase/free up seats and assign the above manually.

parameters.command: =pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Connect-ExchangeOnline -CertificateThumbprint '9A5360CF006242900CE0C1636BC63392835DD5D0' -AppId '45c9b518-c0b0-4933-bfff-29ff6c11831a' -Organization 'michaelgravesarchitecture.onmicrosoft.com' -ShowBanner:$false; try { Set-Mailbox -Identity '{{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}' -Type Regular; Write-Output 'Converted' } finally { Disconnect-ExchangeOnline -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } "

parameters.subject: Action Required: No License Available - New Hire (New Account)
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

A new M365 account is being created for {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }} ({{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}), but the following requested license(s) currently have no available seats:

    {{ $json.unavailableLicenses.map(l => '
  • ' + l.licenseName + '
    • ').join('') }}

The account will still be created; any other requested license(s) with available seats will be assigned normally. Please purchase/free up seats and assign the above manually.

parameters.subject: Alert: New Hire Account Never Became Reachable in Graph API
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

A new M365 account was created for {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }} ({{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}), but it never became reachable in the Graph API after 12 polling attempts (60 seconds).

The account was created successfully in Entra ID but license assignment was skipped. Please check the account status in the Azure portal and assign the requested license(s) manually:

  • User Principal Name: {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}
  • Requested License(s): {{ $('Evaluate License (Create Path)').item.json.licenses.map(l => l.licenseName).join(', ') || 'None requested' }}

This may be a temporary replication delay. Check the account in the Azure portal and retry license assignment if needed.

parameters.subject: New Hire M365 Provisioning Complete
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

M365 provisioning finished for {{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.displayName }} ({{ $('Compute Fields').item.json.userPrincipalName }}).

  • Result: {{ $json.accountStatus }}
  • Licensed: {{ $json.licensesAssigned !== 'None' ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}
  • License(s): {{ $json.licensesAssigned }}{{ $json.anyLicenseUnavailable ? ' (some requested licenses unavailable - see prior alert)' : '' }}
  • Requested: {{ $json.licenseNames }}
    • {{ $json.licensesRemoved && $json.licensesRemoved !== 'None' ? '
  • Removed: ' + $json.licensesRemoved + '
    • ' : '' }}
